creator: romain@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 187193
Fix

Hey Jimmy!

The gnatsd init script has a "gnatsd_username" configuration setting.  This duplicates the gnatsd_user already provided by FreeBSD's init scripts systems: quoting rc.conf(5):

     ⟨name⟩_user
                 (str) Run the service under this user account.

The attached patch simplifies the script and fix this issue.
